title: jmap.rs: eventsource ping parameter unbounded — DoS via huge interval
description: handle_jmap_eventsource accepts ping as Option<u64> with no upper bound. A caller sends ?ping=18446744073709551615 (u64::MAX). Duration::from_secs(u64::MAX) panics in debug mode (overflowing Duration) and in release mode creates a timer that will never fire. RFC 8620 specifies ping as seconds with a minimum of 5; a reasonable max is 3600. Fix: clamp ping to a sane range (e.g. 5..=3600) before passing to Duration::from_secs.
